message:
fix(rate_limit): reset() clears fractional accumulator + formatting

rate_limit.rs:
  reset() now zeroes the fractional accumulator alongside tokens and
  last_refill. Without this, a stale fractional remainder from before
  reset would cause the first post-reset refill period to produce
  extra tokens. Add regression test that verifies exactly 1 token
  is produced after drain+reset+one-period, not 1+stale.

buffer.rs, signal.rs:
  Import reordering (alphabetical) — no behavioral change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
